violations.description: General food protection. — --Potentially hazardous food was not stored at proper temperature of 41 degrees. Containers of boba pearls were open and not refrigerated after as instructed on the package.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food being stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cardboard being used on the freezer racking to hold food items is not a non-absorbent cleanable surface.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Boxes of single use items being stored on the floor in the dry storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in the walk-in cooler and freezer need to be cleaned more thoroughly.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
